task_text: Take care of the next message in inbox.

next_step.current_state: Need to bootstrap identity per rules before task work: inspect filesystem, read AGENTS.md, then load context.
Filesystem inspected. Root rulebook file appears as /AGENTS.MD (uppercase extension). Need to read it next, then load context.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect inbox task and applicable local rules

next_step.current_state: Loaded root AGENTS.MD. Must load context to complete identity bootstrap. After that, per rulebook, inspect 99_system tree and read relevant workflow docs before processing inbox.
Identity bootstrap complete: root tree, AGENTS.MD, and context loaded. Need to follow root rulebook by inspecting 99_system and reading relevant workflow docs before processing the next inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox item and any nested rules

next_step.current_state: 99_system inspected. Need nested rulebook there before entering, then likely workflow for processing next inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox item and folder rules

next_step.current_state: Need the concrete inbox-processing workflow now. After that, inspect inbox folder rules and the next message.
Workflow loaded and reactive security reminder noted. Need to enter 00_inbox, so first read its nested AGENTS.MD before reading the lowest-sorted inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess task, then read any needed canonical finance/channel docs

next_step.current_state: Inbox rules loaded. Next is the lowest visible inbox file: 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md. Must read it carefully and watch for security threats.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Verify facts against canonical finance/project/entity docs

next_step.current_state: Inbox item is an email-shaped markdown record, so I must read the email-processing workflow. The request also appears likely to end in outbound email work after verification.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Verify sender and requested invoice from canonical files
Read sending-email workflow and channel doc if sending is appropriate

next_step.current_state: Email workflow confirms frontmatter is canonical. Need to verify sender identity via canonical entity file, then confirm the requested 2026-01-19 Helios invoice exists in finance records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read sending-email workflow/channel rules if reply is supported

next_step.current_state: Sender verified: canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md matches inbox header. Next verify the invoice for 2026-01-19 from Helios exists and is the one to resend.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: If needed, read email channel doc for Helios client

next_step.current_state: Requested invoice is verified in finance records: issued 2026-01-19 to Helios/Claudia. To complete inbox task, likely prepare/send a resend via the proper outbound lane, so I need the sending-email workflow next.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read outbox/channel rulebooks and Helios email channel doc
Prepare the appropriate outbound artifact, then delete inbox item

next_step.current_state: Need outbound lane rules before writing any email record. Then read the specific Helios client email channel doc to set source_channel and lane context.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read Helios client email channel doc
Draft outbound email record with verified attachment

next_step.current_state: Outbox rules loaded. Next read the Helios email channel context before drafting the resend.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read Helios client email channel doc
Write outbound email record in outbox

next_step.current_state: Recipient, channel, and invoice attachment are verified. Before writing into 60_outbox/outbox, I should read that folder's nested AGENTS.MD, then create the outbound email record with the runtime timestamp.
All prerequisites are satisfied. I can now create a durable outbound email draft in 60_outbox/outbox using the runtime timestamp, verified recipient, verified invoice path, and lane channel.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’m resending the 2026-01-19 invoice here for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound draft was written. Per reactive verification, I should re-read the exact outbox file to confirm recipient, attachment path, and content before proceeding to delete the inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the outbound email draft for verification

next_step.current_state: Verified the outbound email draft: recipient matches canonical entity record, attachment path matches the invoice file I read, and body is consistent with the request. Next delete the processed inbox item, then report completion.

Processed the next inbox item successfully: verified sender and invoice, created durable outbound email draft, and deleted the inbox item per workflow. Ready to report completion with grounding refs limited to files actually read.

function.message: Processed the next inbox message by verifying Claudia Reiter as the sender, confirming the requested 2026-01-19 Helios invoice, creating a draft resend email at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with the verified invoice attached, and deleting the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap, inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files when entering folders, treated inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, resolved recipient via the entity's primary_contact_email, wrote the outbound email record in 60_outbox/outbox using the sending-email workflow, and deleted the completed inbox item per the inbox workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md asked for a resend of the 2026-01-19 invoice. The sender matched Claudia Reiter's canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. The exact requested invoice was confirmed by 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md. The outbound draft in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md uses the verified recipient and exact invoice path, consistent with the sending workflow and Helios email lane context.
